---
id: query-automation-list
title: "List Automations"
description: "Get a paginated list of automation summaries, including each automation's ID, name, enable status, and creation time."
sidebar_label: "List Automations"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: versioned_docs/version-Beta/aqara-developer/data-export-api/data-export-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List Automations"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/automations"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a paginated list of automation summaries, including each automation's ID, name, enable status, and creation time.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"query","name":"definitionTypes","required":false,"description":"List of automation types.    \nSupported values:\nSCRIPT_JSON: **Flow** automation created via API.  \nSCRIPT_TEXT: **Flow** automation created via the Aqara Studio Web page.  \nWHEN_IF_THEN: **Classic** automation.  \nLEGACY_FLOW: **Flow** automation (legacy version).  \nLEGACY_LINKAGE: **Logic** automation.  \nOTHER: Other automation types.    \nExample: definitionTypes=SCRIPT_JSON,LEGACY_FLOW or definitionTypes=SCRIPT_JSON&definitionTypes=LEGACY_FLOW.\nIf not provided or empty, all types will be queried.\n","schema":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"]}},"style":"form","explode":true},{"in":"query","name":"orderBy","required":false,"description":"Sorting method. \n- createTime asc: Sorts results by creation time in ascending order (oldest first).\n- createTime desc: Sorts results by creation time in descending order (newest first).\n","schema":{"type":"string","default":"createTime asc","enum":["createTime asc","createTime desc"]},"example":"createTime asc"},{"in":"query","name":"pageNum","description":"Page number","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","default":1}},{"in":"query","name":"pageSize","description":"Number of items per page","required":false,"schema":{"type":"integer","default":200}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Request succeeded","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"allOf":[{"type":"object","required":["type","version","msgId","code"],"properties":{"type":{"type":"string","description":"Message type"},"version":{"type":"string","description":"API version","example":"v1"},"msgId":{"type":"string","description":"Message ID"},"code":{"type":"integer","description":"Business status code, 0 indicates success"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Message"}},"title":"BaseResponse"},{"type":"object","properties":{"data":{"type":"object","required":["totalCount","pageNum","pageSize","data"],"properties":{"totalCount":{"type":"integer","description":"Total number of automations that meet the conditions"},"pageNum":{"type":"integer","description":"Current page number"},"pageSize":{"type":"integer","description":"Current page size"},"data":{"type":"array","description":"Automation list","items":{"type":"object","required":["automationId","name","enabled","definitionType","createTime"],"properties":{"automationId":{"type":"string","description":"Automation ID."},"name":{"type":"string","description":"Automation name."},"enabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"Whether it is enabled. true: enabled; false: disabled."},"definitionType":{"type":"string","enum":["SCRIPT_JSON","SCRIPT_TEXT","WHEN_IF_THEN","LEGACY_FLOW","LEGACY_LINKAGE","OTHER"],"description":"Automation type, as follows: <br />\n- SCRIPT_JSON：**Flow** automation created via API.  \n- SCRIPT_TEXT：**Flow** automation created via Aqara Studio Web page.  \n- WHEN_IF_THEN：**Classic** automation.  \n- LEGACY_FLOW：**Flow** automation (legacy version).  \n- LEGACY_LINKAGE：**Logic** automation.  \n- OTHER：Other automation types.\n"},"createTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Creation time (UTC timestamp in milliseconds)"},"manualTriggers":{"type":"array","nullable":true,"description":"List of available manual triggers","items":{"type":"object","required":["triggerNodeId","triggerName"],"properties":{"triggerNodeId":{"type":"string","description":"Manual trigger ID"},"triggerName":{"type":"string","description":"Manual trigger name"}},"title":"AutomationManualTriggerBrief"}}},"title":"AutomationSummary"}}},"title":"AutomationListData"}}}],"title":"AutomationListResponse"}}}},"400":{"description":"Request parameter error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"example":{"type":"ErrorMessage","version":"v1","msgId":"a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-err000000001","code":400,"message":"Parameter xxx is required"},"description":"Error response.
